holdings.infoBox: UMDD is an equity ETF with a total of 408 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro MidCap400 (UMDD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund provides 3x exposure to a market cap-weighted index of 400 mid-cap companies. UMDD was launched on Feb 11, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
